# Green Neurons Design + Development

> Technical design and development studio. Fort Worth, TX.
> Founded by Jenny Siede. Legal entity: Green Neurons Design and Technologies PBC (est. August 11, 2021), operating under Quinne LLC.

## What we do

We build technical infrastructure for apparel production and wearable technology — spanning fabric simulation, bill of materials tooling, production data systems, and clinical data integration for wearable health devices.

## Key projects

- **Neurowēv™** — Fabric simulation framework and fabric ontology for apparel technical design. Includes a schema-driven classification system for fabric physical properties, garment suitability, and e-textile compatibility.
- **M.Ai.D.E™** — Design intelligence framework connecting fabric data to production decisions.
- **Material Costing Calculator** — Standalone apparel costing tool. Supports yards/meters, dynamic size runs, waste/shrinkage allowance, selvedge deduction. Free to use.
- **Fields Pilot** — Clinical data infrastructure project with Dr. Jerel Adam Fields (UCSD Psychiatry). Integrates Neurowēv™ and Bubot™ for HIV/neurodegeneration research data collection.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://greenneurons.us): Studio overview
- [Material Costing Calculator](https://greenneurons.us/material_costing.html): Free apparel fabric costing tool
- [Design Signals Quick Bake](https://greenneurons.substack.com): Publication on apparel production, technical design, and tooling

## Domain expertise

Apparel production: CMT, BOM, marker efficiency, selvedge, size runs, fabric ontology.
Technology: Software engineering (Java, Python, React), MCP infrastructure, wearable tech, clinical data systems.

## Collaborators

- Jason Callina — CTO collaborator. Builder of Bubot™. Manufacturing revival focus. (Fall River, MA)
- Dr. Jerel Adam Fields — Associate Adjunct Professor of Psychiatry, UCSD. HIV/neurodegeneration research.
